{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Blackflame Enforcer Trial
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have been running up against the [[Blackflame Enforcer Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
